channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NFL Schedule Releases Focus More on Social Media Hype Than Football Traditions
item.description: The NFL's 2026 schedule release drew widespread attention on social media, with teams producing elaborate videos to engage fans. While some releases, like the Colts' Simpsons-themed video and the Char...

item.title: NDMA Issues Nationwide Weather Alert for Heavy Rains, Thunderstorms and Possible Hailstorms
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has issued a fresh weather advisory warning citizens about heavy rains, thunderstorms, and isolated hailstorms expected across many parts of Pakistan ...

item.title: A Turbulent Week in UK Politics: Leadership Battles and Controversies
item.description: This week in UK politics has been marked by turbulence, highlighted by Keir Starmer's repeated phrase about a 'battle for the soul of the nation,' which evokes a sense of high-stakes drama. The politi...

item.title: Former Congressman Dan Bishop Uses AI to Reassess Election Fraud Claims Rejected by FBI
item.description: Former Representative Dan Bishop, a Republican from North Carolina, has turned to artificial intelligence to investigate claims of voter fraud that were dismissed by the FBI. Bishop, who retired from ...

item.title: UK faces record borrowing costs as political instability affects markets
item.description: The United Kingdom is experiencing a significant increase in borrowing costs, reaching levels not seen since the financial crisis era. This rise in interest rates for government debt reflects growing ...

item.title: Northern Kenya PWD Chairman Calls for Fuel Tax Relief as Prices Rise Sharply
item.description: Persons with disabilities in Kenya are feeling the heavy burden of the latest fuel price increase announced by EPRA. The new prices took effect on 15th May 2026, with petrol in Nairobi now at KSh 214....

item.description: Representative Steve Cohen, a Democrat who has served ten terms representing the Memphis area, announced that he will not seek re-election after Tennessee's Republican-controlled legislature redrew hi...

item.title: The Decline of Traditional Tight Swaddling Practices in Mid-20th Century Northern Italy

item.title: Tanzania Suspends Mining Along Mtisi River Over Environmental Breaches and Launches Review of Technical Support Agreements

item.title: The Role of Bees in Supporting a Diverse Range of Species
item.description: Bees are widely recognised for their essential role in pollinating crops and wild plants, but their influence extends far beyond this. They support a complex web of other organisms, acting as prey, ho...

item.title: Police Arrest Lahore-Karachi Cocaine Network Leader Anmol Pinky
item.description: Anmol Pinky, aged 31, who once aspired to be a model, has been arrested by Karachi police after years of allegedly running a major cocaine distribution network across Lahore and Karachi. Despite havin...

item.title: Microsoft Teams to retire Together mode and prioritize Gallery for better video quality
item.description: Microsoft Teams will officially retire its Together mode on June 30, marking nearly six years since its introduction in July 2020. Together mode was designed to create a more immersive virtual meeting...

item.title: Pep Guardiola Congratulates Man City U18s After FA Youth Cup Win Over Manchester United
item.description: Manchester City Under-18s claimed a 2-1 victory over Manchester United in the FA Youth Cup final, marking their fifth triumph in the competition. The match, held at Joie Stadium, saw City take the lea...

item.title: Hydro-Québec resisted sharing historical records with Newfoundland government
item.description: Documents from the 1960s reveal that Hydro-Québec actively resisted sharing certain records with the Newfoundland government. The documents, uncovered decades later, suggest the utility company took d...

item.title: Exploring the Mundanity and Absurdity of Corporate Offices Through Lars Tunbjörk’s Photography
item.description: Lars Tunbjörk’s iconic photobook, Office / LA Office, recently reissued in an expanded edition by Loose Joints, offers a darkly humorous and critical look at corporate office life. Capturing offices i...

item.title: CIA Director Travels to Cuba Amid US Calls for Policy Changes
